title: Mid-Level Radiologist at AstraZeneca India South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Radiologist at AstraZeneca India South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
AstraZeneca India South Asia Partners has an exciting opening for a Radiologist at our Lucknow office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About AstraZeneca India South Asia Partners:
AstraZeneca India South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AstraZeneca India South Asia Partners!
